name: taskmaster
description: Harness-agnostic task and backlog management with neutral workflow playbooks, narrative continuity, and a local kanban viewer.

interface.longDescription: Manage tasks, epics, areas, bugs, issues, decisions, handovers, and project manifests through an assistant-neutral MCP core and workflow playbooks. Codex receives the verified core and advisory workflow layers; Claude-only enforcement hooks are intentionally excluded.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Taskmaster backlog and orient this session.
Pick the next ready task and explain why it is next.
Review the current task against its completion criteria.
